dependency_notes: Single story with no cross-story dependencies. All changes (new pure helper, two context call-site patches, unit tests) land together atomically.

stories.name: fix-length-only-guards
stories.title: Replace length-only member guards with set-equality checks
stories.description: Extract a pure `membersChanged(stored: string[], current: string[]): boolean` helper into `app/src/lib/marmot/memberGuard.ts`. Patch the two length-only guards in `MarmotContext.tsx` (line 785 startup sync, line 802 onMembersChanged callback) to call this helper so that a length-neutral member swap (same count, different identities) correctly triggers `persistGroup` and `reloadGroups`. Add a vitest unit test at `app/tests/unit/marmot/membersChanged.test.ts` covering both the triggering case (swap) and the no-op case (equal set).

includes: create new file app/src/lib/marmot/memberGuard.ts exporting membersChanged(stored: string[], current: string[]): boolean
patch MarmotContext.tsx line 785 to call membersChanged instead of length comparison
patch MarmotContext.tsx line 802 to call membersChanged instead of length comparison
create new file app/tests/unit/marmot/membersChanged.test.ts with length-neutral swap test and equal-set no-op test
excludes: changes to persistGroup or reloadGroups implementations
modifications to any other call site that reads or writes memberPubkeys

stories.notes: lighter_path is false: files_code is non-empty (memberGuard.ts, MarmotContext.tsx, membersChanged.test.ts are all .ts/.tsx). The first lighter_path predicate (len(files_code)==0) fails immediately. Two of the three file targets do not exist on disk at planning time (memberGuard.ts, membersChanged.test.ts), which would also flip new_file=true.
